texto: Most of my major disappointments have turned out to be blessings in disguise. So whenever anything bad does happen to me I kind of sit back and feel well if I give this enough time it'll turn out that this was good so I shan't worry about it too much.
explicacao: Citação de William Gaines sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Most of my major disappointments have turned out to be blessings in disguise. So whenever anythin…” articula reflexao, forgiveness, major em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
